_comment: Secondary build config for the opencc-internals mirror. The main tsconfig excludes this dir (its surface is consumed via source-on-the-fly at runtime), but some pre-existing TS errors in upstream files need a relaxed build. We emit just enough .js files to satisfy runtime require()s — primarily the newly-added denialTracking / permissionSetup stubs, plus the cwd / file / debug helpers other tools depend on.
